calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: June Beltran, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises Ms. Beltran to consider hiring counsel to assist her with this petition and the requirement of an ex parte application to appoint a Guardian Ad Litem for her son Sebastian. Ms. Beltran agrees to seek counsel. Ms. Beltran also confirms that her son is no longer a minor and has moved to New York. The court directs Ms. Beltran to file something with the court to confirm the preceding.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trustee and Trustee Assets is continued to August 2, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
